zh.lifeSummary: 當Otto I. Markgraf von Brandenburg於大約1126年6月21日出生在德國薩辛可萊斯 德累斯頓德累斯頓時，他的父親Albrecht I. 'der Bär' von Brandenburg27歲，母親Sophie von Winzenburg18歲。他於1175年與Ada of Holland結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他去世於1184年7月8日享年58歲，埋葬在德國布藍登波格波斯達姆。

nameMeanings.name: Otto
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a short form of any of the various Germanic compound personal names containing the element od, ot ‘prosperity, wealth’ ( compare the corresponding Old English ēad in names such as Edward and Edwin ). St Otto of Bamberg ( d. 1139 ) was a missionary to the Pomeranians. Otto the Great ( 912–73 ) is generally regarded as the founder of the Holy Roman Empire, and the name has been borne by several members of German and Austrian royal houses. It was recorded occasionally among immigrants to England from the Low Countries in the 14th century, but failed to establish itself. Since the 19th century it has again been used occasionally in the English-speaking world, mostly among immigrants from Germanic countries.

en.lifeSummary: When Otto I. Markgraf von Brandenburg was born about 21 June 1126, in Dresden, Kreis Dresden, Saxony, Germany, his father, Albrecht I. 'der Bär' von Brandenburg, was 27 and his mother, Sophie von Winzenburg, was 18. He married Ada of Holland in 1175. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He died on 8 July 1184, at the age of 58, and was buried in Potsdam, Brandenburg, Germany.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Otto I. Markgraf von Brandenburg est né environ 21 juin 1126, à Dresden, Kreis Dresden, Sachsen, Allemagne, son père, Albrecht I. 'der Bär' von Brandenburg, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Sophie von Winzenburg, avait 18 ans. Il a épousé Ada of Holland en 1175. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Il est décédé le 8 juillet 1184, à l’âge de 58 ans, et a été enterré à Potsdam, Brandenburg, Allemagne.

de.lifeSummary: Als Otto I. Markgraf von Brandenburg um 21. Juni 1126 in Dresden, Kreis Dresden, Sachsen, Deutschland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Albrecht I. 'der Bär' von Brandenburg 27 und seine Mutter Sophie von Winzenburg 18. Er hat 1175 Ada of Holland geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Er starb am 8. Juli 1184 im Alter von 58 Jahren und wurde in Potsdam, Brandenburg, Deutschland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Otto I. Markgraf von Brandenburg è nato il circa 21 giugno 1126 nel Dresden, Kreis Dresden, Sachsen, Germania, il suo padre, Albrecht I. 'der Bär' von Brandenburg, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Sophie von Winzenburg, aveva 18 anni. Lui sposato Ada of Holland nel 1175. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì il 8 luglio 1184, all'età di 58 anni, e fu sepolto a Potsdam, Brandenburg, Germania.

ja.lifeSummary: Otto I. Markgraf von Brandenburgが約1126年6月21日にドイツサチセンクレイス ドレスデンドレスデンで生まれた時，父Albrecht I. 'der Bär' von Brandenburgは27歳，母Sophie von Winzenburgは18歳であった。1175年にAda of Hollandと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼は1184年7月8日に58歳で死去し，ドイツブランデンブルグポトスダムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Otto I. Markgraf von Brandenburg(이)가 대략 1126년 6월 21일 독일 작센 크레이스 드레즈든 드레즈든에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Albrecht I. pt.lifeSummary: Quando Otto I. Markgraf von Brandenburg nasceu aproximadamente 21 de junho de 1126, em Dresden, Kreis Dresden, Sachsen, Alemanha, seu pai, Albrecht I. 'der Bär' von Brandenburg, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Sophie von Winzenburg, tinha 18 anos. Ele casou-se com Ada of Holland em 1175. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ele faleceu em 8 de julho de 1184, com 58 anos, e foi sepultado em Potsdam, Brandenburg, Alemanha.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Otto I. Markgraf von Brandenburg родился около 21 июня 1126 г. в местности дресден, крис дресден, сачсен, Германия, его отцу по имени Albrecht I. 'der Bär' von Brandenburg было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Sophie von Winzenburg, 18. Он женился на женщине по имени Ada of Holland в 1175 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Он умер 8 июля 1184 г. в возрасте 58 лет и был похоронен в местности поцдам, брэнденбург, Германия.
